prompt: Create a single-file HTML5 Canvas flappy bird game. All visuals drawn procedurally. Animated bird with distinct up-stroke and down-stroke wing shapes, body tilt, squash-and-stretch on flap, feather particles from wing tips. Pipes with gradient shading, cap/lip, cylindrical highlight. Three-layer parallax background: sky with day/night colour cycle and stars, clouds with bobbing, rolling hills. Death explosion, +1 score pop, ambient floating motes. Start screen, death screen with best score in localStorage. Delta-time physics. Make it gorgeous.
